title: Nivenia stylosa
intro: Nivenia stylosa, also known as the "nivenia," is a perennial plant species endemic to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Nivenia stylosa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Nivenia stylosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
